finding: Messages from close personal sources increase behavioral participation in collective activities more than impersonal organizational sources; this effect is mediated by cognitive elaboration of the message content and moderated by perceived source credibility

Extraneous bodily feelings of disgust increase severity of moral judgments regardless of whether the moral scenario itself involves disgust; this effect operates only for individuals sensitive to their own bodily sensations

Under time pressure, people automatically serve self-interest through dishonesty; deliberation time allows reduction or elimination of lying when private justifications are absent, but enables lying when justifications exist

Individuals with PTSD show significantly impaired suppression-induced forgetting of aversive memories compared to trauma-exposed controls, with degree of suppression deficit correlating with symptom severity

Non-face objects with salient Gestalt properties (connectedness, closure, continuity) are processed holistically like faces without any training; weakening Gestalt information reduces holistic processing

Parents' beliefs about whether failure is debilitating or enhancing predict children's intelligence mind-sets through visible parental responses that children perceive; failure mind-sets predict children's beliefs whereas parental intelligence mind-sets do not
